name: vscode-ai-agent-assistant
description: VS Code assistant with full file context, related imports/tests, configurable LLM endpoint, and project actions.

aiAgentAssistant.openRouter.model.description: LLM model identifier used for agent responses.

aiAgentAssistant.openRouter.baseUrl.description: Full chat/completions endpoint URL for OpenRouter or another compatible provider.

aiAgentAssistant.openRouter.requestTimeo.description: LLM endpoint request timeout in milliseconds.

aiAgentAssistant.context.maxImportedFile.description: Maximum number of imported files included in the prompt.

aiAgentAssistant.context.maxTests.description: Maximum number of related test files included in the prompt.

aiAgentAssistant.context.maxFileChars.description: Maximum characters loaded from each context file.

aiAgentAssistant.agent.maxIterations.description: Default maximum number of agent iterations before pause/continue is offered.

aiAgentAssistant.execution.requireConfir.description: Ask for confirmation before running shell commands or bash scripts.

aiAgentAssistant.execution.autoApplyFile.description: Apply LLM-proposed file changes immediately without opening a diff for approval.

aiAgentAssistant.execution.commandTimeou.description: Timeout for shell and bash execution tools in milliseconds.

scripts.validate: node --check src/extension.js && node --check src/ui/AssistantViewProvider.js && node --check src/agent/AgentRuntime.js && node --check src/agent/ContextCollector.js && node --check src/agent/OpenRouterClient.js && node --check src/agent/ToolExecutor.js && node --check media/main.js
